title: Peek Polish 100ml Tube
features: Restore Shine Effortlessly: Bring back the gleam to your metal surfaces with Peek Metal Polish, formulated to remove tarnish, oxidation, and stubborn stains
Long-lasting Protection: Our advanced formula not only restores shine but also creates a protective barrier, shielding metal against future corrosion and dullness.

Superior Versatility: From stainless steel appliances to chrome fixtures, Peek Metal Polish is suitable for a wide range of metal surfaces. Rediscover the brilliance in every corner. ADD TO BASKET now
Easy Application: With its easy-to-use formula, simply apply, polish, and buff to reveal a mirror-like finish, making your metal surfaces look brand new with minimal effort
Trusted Quality: Proudly made with high-quality ingredients, Peek Metal Polish delivers exceptional results, trusted by professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike
description: From the manufacturer Peek Metal Polish Keep your furniture, equipment and cooking appliances polished and protected with this Peek Metal Polish. Simply apply the polish to any metal, fibreglass or ceramic hobs and remove to achieve a spectacular gleaming finish that staff and guests are sure to appreciate. This effective tube of Peek Metal Polish is great for furniture and metal detailing in bars or reception areas. The powerful solution also removes rust and tarnishing from metallic utensils and surfaces to restore their original spotless appearance with little effort required; saving you on costly replacement bills. This powerful polish brings tarnished and oxidized surfaces back to life Surfaces are left bright and beautiful Leaves behind a light, invisible protective coating Suitable for use on all metals, fibreglass and ceramics The solution is food safe How To Use Peek Metal Polish To use your Peek metal polish, follow these three simple steps: Apply a small amount of Peek polish to your surfaces with a cloth, sponge brush or polish pad.R ub in the polish with rotational movements until a black layer appearsU sing a soft cloth, polish and clean until a high-gloss finish appears on your metallic surfaces.
